message:
docs(tests): clarify agent index comments in stagger tests

Update comments in TestStaggerMaxDelayCalculation to use explicit
0-indexed notation ("last agent (idx N)") instead of ambiguous
"agent N" which could be confused with 1-indexed ordinals.

For example, "10 agents: max is agent 10" was misleading since
agent indices are 0-9, not 1-10. Now reads "last agent (idx 9)".

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
